allowed_uses: generation of original AxiomIQ candidate questions without reproducing long source passages
author_or_institution: William Moebs, Samuel J. Ling, Jeff Sanny / OpenStax
committed_report_scope: derived receipt and compiler proof outputs only
net_force_coverage: present: section repeatedly defines and applies net external force and F_net = m a
newtons_second_law_coverage: present: section 5.3 is dedicated to Newton's second law and component form
normalization_method: Mechanical HTML text extraction from official OpenStax page; navigation/script/style removed; headings, formulas, examples, citation, and license footer preserved; whitespace normalized; no OCR; no summarization.
restricted_uses: do not commit raw source to a Git repository in this lane
do not publish long source passages in compiler reports
do not mark derived material canonical or student-visible without review
do not use for LLM training or ingestion into LLM offerings contrary to OpenStax notice
retain attribution and CC BY-NC-SA terms for redistributed source excerpts
source_title: University Physics Volume 1, Section 5.3 Newton's Second Law
vectors_coverage: present: force is treated as a vector, force vectors add, component form uses x/y/z force and acceleration components
